regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces unprecedented military pressure from coordinated US and Israeli operations, including three carrier groups, 200+ aircraft, and multiple Israeli strikes on military infrastructure and regime institutions, while a weakened Supreme Leader recovers from injuries and a Provisional Leadership Council attempts interim governance amid internal fracturing between civilians demanding negotiations and hardliners opposing talks. Escalation continues with Iranian ballistic missile barrages (10 total), IRGC attacks on shipping, and US threats to strike senior commanders if diplomacy fails, creating a multi-front crisis of military, diplomatic, succession, and internal stability.
regime_fall.last_major_event: On June 16, 2026, the IDF struck Iranian regime security institutions and the Shahran oil depot near Tehran, while Iran launched approximately 30 ballistic missiles targeting Haifa in Operation True Promise III with 92% interception rates, and Supreme Leader Khamenei appointed Maj. Gen. Amir Hatami as Artesh commander emphasizing 'active deterrence.'
